title: Borvo's Vault
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:BorvosVault.jpg]] |name=Borvo's Vault |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Paitnnu Wetlands]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Old Republic Droid Modules: Borvo's Battle Droid|Naboo}} |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation=[[Nal Raka Criminal Empire]] }} {{Quote|All you have to do is get it out of my vault. The vault security needs to be tested anyway. Good luck!|[[Borvo]], to a spacer|}} '''Borvo's Vault''' was an underground facility located a short distance south of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Moenia/Legends|Moenia]] in the [[Paitnnu Wetlands]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. ==History== {{Quote|I defeated the security in your vault.''"
"''I don't believe it! You got through the security? Maybe my hints were too helpful. Well, I owe Jabba 10,000 credits. He told me you'd pull it off. I guess I should have believed him.|A spacer and Borvo the Hutt|}} [[File:BorvosVaultInterior.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The interior of Borvo's Vault.]] During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Borvo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire]] used the compound as vault to store various valuables, including [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and [[Droid/Legends|droid]] parts. The entrance to the vault was guarded by one of Borvo's dimwitted lackeys. The interior was defended by [[blastromech droid]]s, [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 battle droids]], [[IG-series/Legends|IG assassin droids]] and [[Murra/Legends|Murras]]. To further aid in the security of [[Gender/Legends|his]] vault, Borvo also kept a pet [[Borvo's acklay|acklay]] and [[Borvo's rancor|rancor]] within the confines of the vault's interior. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] managed to compromise the security of the vault to retrieve an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Artificial intelligence/Legends|decentralized autonomy chip]] droid module. When the spacer reported the news to Borvo, he was incredulous, and remarked that he now owed [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a [[Gambling/Legends|bet]]. ==Behind the scenes== Borvo's Vault was a location in the [[2003]] [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Borvo's Vault was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki}} [[Category:Buildings]] [[Category:Gungan Swamp locations]] [[Category:Nal Raka Criminal Empire]]
